01
Why TradeMatch

A problem worth solving.

The UK trades market is broken. Homeowners overpay. Tradespeople get buried in admin. We're building the infrastructure to fix it — a verified, transparent marketplace that works for both sides of the equation.

Real-world impact
Every feature we ship saves homeowners time and money on real jobs.
Ownership from day one
Small team, big remit. You'll own your domain and ship fast.
A team that cares
Ex-Deliveroo, Rightmove, and Rated People — low ego, high output.
Team NPS score
87
Measured quarterly
02
How We Work

Async-first. Results-driven.

We default to writing over meetings. Our best thinking happens in Notion docs, Loom videos, and pull requests — not endless Zoom calls. We measure outcomes, not hours.

Remote by default
Work from anywhere in the UK or EU. We meet in person quarterly.
Competitive comp & equity
Market salary, EMI options, and a generous L&D budget for everyone.
Radical transparency
Company metrics shared weekly. Everyone sees the full picture.
Offer acceptance rate
94%
We hire well
03
Growth & Learning

Invest in your craft.

We don't want you to plateau. Every team member gets a personal L&D budget, access to mentors, and the space to experiment. We promote from within wherever we can.

Ă‚Ĺ1,500 annual L&D budget
Spend it on courses, books, conferences — no approval needed.
6-monthly performance reviews
Structured feedback cycles tied to clear, achievable goals.
Benefits & Perks

Everything you need to thrive.

We believe great work happens when people feel genuinely supported — at work and outside of it. Here's what we offer every person at TradeMatch.

Remote-first culture
Work from anywhere in the UK or EU. We have a London hub for those who want it, and we gather in person every quarter.
Private health cover
Full Bupa private medical insurance for you and your immediate family from day one. Dental and optical included.
EMI equity options
Everyone gets options. We're growing fast, and we want the people who built it to share in that outcome.
Ă‚Ĺ1,500 L&D budget
Use it however you want — courses, books, conferences, coaching. No approvals needed, just use it.
Flexible hours & 35 days off
We care about output, not hours. Take your 25 days plus UK bank holidays, plus a week extra for life admin.
Enhanced parental leave
16 weeks full pay for all parents, regardless of gender or how your family was formed. No awkward conversations needed.

Our Hiring Process

Simple, fast, respectful.

We won't ghost you. We won't make you do a 4-stage take-home before a first call. Our process is designed to be quick for great candidates.

avg. 2-week process
01 —
Apply online
One page, no cover letter required. Tell us what you've built and why TradeMatch.
02 —
Intro call (30 min)
A quick conversation with the hiring manager. We'll answer your questions too.
03 —
Skills interview
A focused 90-min session on real problems we've faced. We pay for your time if it's a take-home.
04 —
Meet the team & offer
A final relaxed conversation with future teammates — then a written offer within 48 hours.
Life at TradeMatch

Built by people who care.

We work across living rooms, co-working spaces, and the occasional rooftop. Our quarterly offsites keep us grounded in the real world our platform serves.

Craft & Precision
Up High & Fearless
Detail-oriented
Problem solvers
Smooth operators

Don't see the right role?
We want to hear from you.

Send us a speculative application. If you're exceptional and the timing isn't right, we'll keep you on file and reach out when it is.
